description: M6.fr is the web property for M6+, a French streaming and television platform from Groupe M6. It publishes live and on-demand program content and related support information.
summary: m6.fr exposes a public M6plus MCP server at `https://prod-v1.mcp.m6.fr/mcp`; no public developer-facing HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found on `m6.fr`.
